Rule.name: six_list_directory
Rule.Description: List contents of file system directory

Argument.name: title
Argument.Description: Descriptive name for the action executed upon submitting this form (metaparameter)

Argument.name: path
Argument.Description: Absolute path to directory to list ("path" parameter)

Argument.name: filter
Argument.Description: Regular expression to match entries against ("filter" parameter)
